ddt:Target.Name: USM_CMF1_SED_C1-2a
ddt:Target.Description:
The DDT 2000 file is auto generated by Power tool. (DEASIC4/65692/UET Modélisation USM)
v1.2 : add SW auto-ident and HZJ project 170206 : add logiciel - version for SW C1.2 _ change on 170303 _ change on name on 170316

Data.Name: C_D_NeutralContact_NoFail
Data.Comment: [km] Maximum distance to detect no failure when neutral contact is detected always present [1;1;4]

Data.Name: C_D_NeutralContactAlwaysPresent
Data.Comment: [km] Maximum distance to detect failure when neutral contact is detected always present and engine is running [1;1;8]

Data.Name: C_D_NeutralContactNeverPresent
Data.Comment: [km] Maximum distance to detect failure when neutral contact is detected never present and engine is running [16;1;128]

Data.Name: C_D_RearGear_NoFail
Data.Comment: [km] Maximum distance to detect no failure when rear contact is detected always present [1;1;4]

Data.Name: C_D_RearGearAlwaysPresent
Data.Comment: [km] Maximum distance to detect failure when rear contact is detected always present and engine is running [1;1;10]

Data.Name: C_K_MissionNbrNeutralFailure
Data.Comment: [] Nbr of mission before detect failure when neutral contact is detected never present and engine is running [0;1;10]

Data.Name: C_K_MissionNbrOilFailure
Data.Comment: [-] Number of missions to confirm Oil pressure switch failure [0:1:50]

Data.Name: C_K_StarterDeactivation
Data.Comment: [] Threshold to switch off the starter [0;1;100]

Data.Name: C_Ki_CurrentLowS
Data.Comment: [PWM/A.s] PID Integral Gain parameter in low mode[O;1;2000]

Data.Name: C_Ki_CurrentNorm
Data.Comment: [PWM/A.s] PID Integral Gain parameter in normal mode[O;1;2000]

Data.Name: C_Kp_CurrentLowS
Data.Comment: [PWM/A] PID proportional Gain parameter in low mode[O;1;254]

Data.Name: C_Kp_CurrentNorm
Data.Comment: [PWM/A] PID proportional Gain parameter in normal mode [O;1;254]

Data.Name: C_Pct_JaugeCourantInit
Data.Comment: [%] Initial value of the estimated SOC [0;1;100]

Data.Name: C_PWM_ACCompValveConverted
Data.Comment: [PWM] Default Value of V_PWM_ACCompValveConverted (when function Compressor Valve Gateway Mode is disabled at initialization) [O;1;255]

Data.Name: C_PWM_ACCompValvePIDout
Data.Comment: [PWM] Default Value of V_PWM_ACCompValvePIDout (when function AC Valve PID Regulation mode is disabled at initialization) [O;1;255]

Data.Name: C_PWM_ACCompValveSetting
Data.Comment: [PWM] Default Value of V_PWM_ACCompValveSetting (when function "Compressor Valve Regulation" is disabled)[O;1;255]

Data.Name: C_PWM_CompValveCommand_LHM
Data.Comment: [PWM] Valve PWM value applied if the valve request command is not available when the clutch is engaged.[O;1;100]

Data.Name: C_PWM_CompValveCommand_NM
Data.Comment: [PWM] Valve PWM value during a clutch engagement processing[O;1;100]

Data.Name: C_PWM_HighSpeedActivation
Data.Comment: [%] Threshold to activate the fan in high speed [0:1:100]

Data.Name: C_PWM_HighSpeedDectivation
Data.Comment: [%] Threshold to deactivate the fan from high speed to low speed [0:1:100]

Data.Name: C_PWM_LowSpeedActivation
Data.Comment: [%] Threshold to activate the fan in low speed [0:1:100]

Data.Name: C_PWM_LowSpeedDectivation
Data.Comment: [%] Threshold to deactivate the fan from low speed [0:1:100]

Data.Name: C_PWM_SatDutyCycleSet_max
Data.Comment: [PWM] Upper limit of the saturation Sat_DutyCycleSet[O;1;100]

Data.Name: C_PWM_SatDutyCycleSet_min
Data.Comment: [PWM] Lower limit of the saturation Sat_DutyCycleSet[O;1;100]

Data.Name: C_S_VehicleRunnig_max
Data.Comment: [km/h] Vehicle speed above which "VehicleRunning" is activated [0;0.1;10]

Data.Name: C_S_VehicleRunnig_min
Data.Comment: [km/h] Vehicle speed under which "VehicleRunning" is disactivated [0;0.01;10]

Data.Name: C_Td_CurrentLowS
Data.Comment: [s] PID derivative time constant parameter in low mode [O;0.1;100]

Data.Name: C_Td_CurrentNorm
Data.Comment: [s] PID derivative time constant parameter in normal mode[O;0.1;100]

Data.Name: C_TM_ACClutchActivation
Data.Comment: [s] Delay before activating compressor clutch when ACCompAuthorized comes to active [O;0.01;2.5]

Data.Name: C_TM_HalogenStabilization
Data.Comment: [seconds] Duration for stabilization of Halogen Lights when switched on [0:0.01:2,55]

Data.Name: C_TM_HighSpeedFan_Enable
Data.Comment: [ms] Timeout to ensure a stabilized OFF operation after status changing from low speed to high speed [0:1:255]

Data.Name: C_TM_HighSpeedFanStable
Data.Comment: [seconds] Timeout to ensure stabilized high speed reached by the motor fan from high speed to low speed. [0;100;2000]

Data.Name: C_TM_IgnON_EngineOFF
Data.Comment: [s] Time out before detecting failure when ignition is ON and engine is stopped [O;0.1;10]

Data.Name: C_TM_LimpHomeModeFan
Data.Comment: [seconds] Timeout to control the motor fan in low speed when CAN bus is off or when thed ECM is absent to ensure the cooling of the engine and when ignition disappears. [0;1;600]

Data.Name: C_TM_LowSpeedFan_Enable
Data.Comment: [ms] Timeout to ensure a stabilized OFF operation after status changing from high speed to low speed [0:1:255]

Data.Name: C_TM_LowSpeedFanStable
Data.Comment: [seconds] Timeout to ensure a stabilized low speed reached by the motor fan from stopped state to high speed [0;1;10]

Data.Name: C_TM_NeutralContact_NoFail
Data.Comment: [s] Maximum duration to detect no failure when neutral contact is detected never present [0;0.5;5]

Data.Name: C_TM_OilPressureWarning
Data.Comment: [s] Time out to enable warning if oil pressure is opened and engine RPM is higher than a threshold [O;1;10]

Data.Name: C_TM_QuickStarterCANConfirmation
Data.Comment: [ms] [0;10;5000] Maximum time to receive the CAN confirmation after receiving the trigger from ECM before shuting down the starter

Data.Name: C_TM_RefreshBattTempCalcul
Data.Comment: [s] Time to refresh Battery Temperature Calculation [1;1;255]

Data.Name: C_TM_StabilizedInLowSpeed
Data.Comment: [seconds] Timeout to ensure a stabilized low speed reached by the front wiper motor [0,0.01,1]

Data.Name: C_TM_Starter2Delay
Data.Comment: [ms] [0;10;5000] Delay time to activate SS_STARTER_RLY after STARTER_RLY

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data) Not applicable

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data) Not applicable

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data) Applicable

Item.Text: signal has too few transitions events
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
alive sequence counter incorrect not updated
signal has too many transitions events
circuit short to battery or open
circuit short to ground or open
Device and failure type ODB codding Gen Failure Info
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level outofrange 0 adjust failure

Data.Name: NumberOfMissions_id
Data.Comment: Identifier of the counter to be reseted.

Request.Name: Read Configuration part number HL Levelizer
Write Configuration part number HL Levelizer

Device.Name: Z_Read Configuration part number HL Levelizer

Screen.Name: Read Configuration part number HL Levelizer

Display.RequestName: Read Configuration part number HL Levelizer

Input.RequestName: Write Configuration part number HL Levelizer

Label.Text: In yellow : values expected to have Stop and Start and ESM available
Electrical Energy Management contact : Andreea BALASETE
